# Read Localization Information of a Default App Clip Experience

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get localized metadata that appears on the App Clip card of a specific default App Clip experience.

## Getting Metadata for Your Default App Clip Experience

- **Read App Clip Card Image Information for a Localized Default App Clip Experience**: Get the image that appears on the App Clip card, specific to a locale, for a default App Clip experience.
- **GET /v1/appClipDefaultExperienceLocalizations/{id}/relationships/appClipHeaderImage**
